Experience

Apr 2025 — Jun 2025 Simulation Lab · Maharashtra, India
CAE Engineer Intern
  • Conducted thermal analysis of an EV Battery Thermal Management System using ANSYS Fluent, evaluating Water-CuO nanofluid performance across a multi-stage cooler to achieve improved battery efficiency.
  • Executed 60+ simulations across two temperature ranges to assess fluid heat transfer and cooling effectiveness.
  • Interpreted results using Microsoft Excel to support thermal efficiency improvements and design optimization.
Nov 2021 — Nov 2022 John Crane · Karnataka, India
Mechanical Design Engineer
  • Created detailed component and general assembly drawings with BOMs in Solid Edge using GD&T, based on API piping plans and customer requirements.
  • Developed standard design templates for 3 mechanical seal types compatible with automation software, achieving a 62.5% reduction in component drawing creation time (from 4 hours to 1.5 hours).
  • Utilized Teamcenter for document management, version control, and workflow automation across the full product lifecycle.
★ 2× Excellence Awards — 8% reduction in manufacturing cost & time

Projects

1 / 3
Additive Manufacturing Prototype of a Lightweight Drone Airframe
This project showcases a custom-designed, single-piece drone chassis engineered in SolidWorks and fabricated via FDM 3D printing. The design integrates a centralized payload/electronics bay with angled, wide-stance landing legs to ensure structural stability and impact distribution during landings. Print-bed orientation was optimized by printing the airframe inverted, utilizing advanced organic tree support structures inside the central enclosure to maintain clean internal overhang geometry while minimizing material waste and post-processing effort.
SolidWorksFDM 3D PrintingBambu Lab H2DTree SupportsDFMLightweight Design
Thermal Analysis of EV Battery Management System
Comprehensive CFD analysis of a Battery Thermal Management System for electric vehicles. Evaluated Water-CuO nanofluid performance across a multi-stage cooler using ANSYS Fluent, running 60+ simulations to map temperature, pressure, velocity, and heat flux.
ANSYS FluentCFDThermal AnalysisNanofluidExcel
Twin Wire Arc Additive Manufacturing Machine
A research project spanning design, fabrication, programming, and testing to achieve 3D printed metallic components. Designed in SolidWorks, fabricated via CNC machining, and programmed the MACH3 controller interface board to control deposit feeder movement.
SolidWorksCNC MachiningMACH3Additive MfgMaterials Selection
Cooling System for Polymer Electron Membrane Fuel Cells
Study on PEMFC working principles and existing cooling channel designs. Designed improved cooling channels in SolidWorks, analyzed flow behavior in ANSYS Fluent, and verified simulation results against a CNC-milled physical prototype.
SolidWorksANSYS FluentCFDCNC MillingPEMFC
Accelerometer-Controlled Bluetooth Mobile Robot
Built an Arduino Uno-based mobile robot as part of an online robotics course. Developed a custom Android app that streams real-time motion commands to the robot using the phone's built-in accelerometer — tilting the phone forward, backward, or sideways drives the robot in the corresponding direction. An HC-05 Bluetooth transceiver module mounted on the robot receives the wireless signals from the app and relays them to the Arduino, which drives the DC motors via an L298N motor driver board.
Arduino UnoHC-05 BluetoothAndroid App DevAccelerometerL298N Motor DriverWireless Control
